name: WEDDING PREWEDDING SERVICE
contentType:
#TelahDimulai
@yudistirakevin__ & @nathaniaelviani_ 

Chapter I 
"Where one of their ten-year memories quietly lives."

Inspired by the Japanese legend of Akai Ito, the Red Thread of Fate, this story believes that two souls destined for each other are bound by an invisible crimson string stretched by time, tested by distance, yet never broken.
